User Story
As an exporter

I want the service to be designed in a user-friendly way

So that I can clearly understand and navigate the details I need to provide

Acceptance Criteria
Scenario 1 - hint text updated

Given I have navigated to page /progress in my Non-Manipulation Document user journey

When the page loads

Then the text ‘Storage Document application: GBR-2026-SD-XXXXX’ is renamed to ‘Non-manipulation document application: GBR-2026-SD-XXXXX’

 

Scenario 2 - Welsh translation

Given I have navigated to page /progress in my Non-Manipulation Document user journey

When I have selected Welsh language

Then the text will be translated into Welsh

English text

Welsh translation

Non-manipulation document application

Cais am ddogfen dim triniaeth
